name: ExtensionImagingStudy_Modality
title: R5: All of the distinct values for series' modalities additional types
description: R5: `ImagingStudy.modality` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImagingStudy.modality` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImagingStudy.modality` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImagingStudy.modality` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `ImagingStudy.modality` 0..* `Coding`
*  R4: `ImagingStudy.modality` 0..* `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImagingStudy.modality` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.modality` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.modality` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.modality` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.
